en.extract:
The white-throated bushtit (Aegithalos niveogularis), also known as the white-throated tit, is a species of bird in the family Aegithalidae.  It is found in India, Nepal, and Pakistan.  Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''white-throated bushtit''' ('''''Aegithalos niveogularis'''''), also known as the '''white-throated tit''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Aegithalidae]].  It is found in [[India]], [[Nepal]], and [[Pakistan]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
